description:
Automating deployment of service RS.Deploy.Web which manages installing our applications.
	
	Package installation parameters:
	Path: service installation folder
	Port: service Deploy.Web running port
	SSL:  y/yes/n/no to use SSL
	
	Example: `--params '"/Path:C:\Services /Port:8081 /SSL:no"'`
summary: This application automates the process of deploying RS.Deploy.Web
author: Mariana Iordan,  Bialko Istvan
